540000.name: Boosting Spellbook
descriptionLines: A special Book prepared for your rapid growth.
Aumenta ^777777Neutro^000000 elemental magic o dano em 3%.
Aumenta ^777777Neutro^000000 elemental magic o dano em additional 2%.
Aumenta o dano mágico contra all sized enemies em 10%.
Quando combinado com ^990099Elemental Booster Robe^000000, ^990099Elemental Booster Muffler^000000, ^990099Elemental Booster Shoes^000000 e ^990099Elemental Booster Earring^000000:
Aumenta o dano mágico contra all sized enemies em additional 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Psychic Wave^000000 em 1%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Psychic Wave^000000 em additional 20% for 60 segundos.
Quando combinado com ^990099Default Booster Robe^000000, ^990099Default Booster Muffler^000000, ^990099Default Booster Shoes^000000 e ^990099Default Booster Earring^000000:
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Lanças de Fogo^000000, ^009900Cold Bolt^000000, ^009900Lightning Bolt^000000 em 2%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Lanças de Fogo^000000, ^009900Cold Bolt^000000, ^009900Lightning Bolt^000000 em additional 35% for 60 segundos.

540001.name: Boosting Text
descriptionLines: A special Book prepared for your rapid growth.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 1%).
Quando combinado com ^990099Attack Booster Plate^000000, ^990099Attack Booster Manteau^000000, ^990099Attack Booster Greaves^000000 e ^990099Attack Booster Ring^000000:
Aumenta o dano físico contra all sized enemies em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Full Moon Kick^000000 em 1%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Full Moon Kick^000000 em additional 20% for 60 segundos.
Quando combinado com ^990099Ranged Booster Suit^000000, ^990099Ranged Booster Manteau^000000, ^990099Ranged Booster Boots^000000 e ^990099Ranged Booster Brooch^000000:
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Falling Star^000000 em 2%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Falling Star^000000 em additional 35% for 60 segundos.

540002.name: Livro Espiritual
descriptionLines: Um livro imbuído com o poder de manipular almas.
Aumenta em 5% o dano físico e mágico contra monstros da raça ^0000ffHumanoide^000000 (exceto jogadores) e em 5% contra monstros da propriedade ^0000ffSombrio^000000.
Aumenta em 5% adicionais o dano físico e mágico contra monstros da raça ^0000ffHumanoide^000000 (exceto jogadores) e em 5% adicionais contra monstros da propriedade ^0000ffSombrio^000000.
Aumenta em 10% adicionais o dano físico e mágico contra monstros da raça ^0000ffHumanoide^000000 (exceto jogadores) e em 10% adicionais contra monstros da propriedade ^0000ffSombrio^000000.

540004.name: Sloth Text
descriptionLines: A technical book that was kept in the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900New Moon Kick^000000 em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900New Moon Kick^000000 em additional 15%.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 10%).
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Full Moon Kick^000000 em 25%.

540005.name: Sloth Bible
descriptionLines: A recording book that was kept in the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Physical e magical attacks have a chance to recover 300SP per segundo for 5 segundos.
Diminui o dano recebido de ^FF0000Normal^000000 class monsters em 15%.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável em 3%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Lanças de Fogo^000000 e ^009900Lightning Bolt^000000 em 25%.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 10%).
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Lanças de Fogo^000000 e ^009900Lightning Bolt^000000 em additional 30%.

540009.name: Spell Bolt Booster Book
descriptionLines: A Book designed to help adventurers grow.
ATQM +3 (Applies até o nível de base 195)
Aumenta ^0000BBÁgua^000000, ^33CC00Vento^000000, ^CC5500Terra^000000 e ^FF0000Fogo^000000 elemental magic o dano em 1%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Lanças de Fogo^000000, ^009900Cold Bolt^000000, ^009900Lightning Bolt^000000, ^009900Earth Spike^000000 e ^009900Heaven's Drive^000000 em 25%.
Aumenta ^0000BBÁgua^000000, ^33CC00Vento^000000, ^CC5500Terra^000000 e ^FF0000Fogo^000000 elemental magic o dano em additional 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Lanças de Fogo^000000, ^009900Cold Bolt^000000, ^009900Lightning Bolt^000000, ^009900Earth Spike^000000 e ^009900Heaven's Drive^000000 em additional 15%.

540010.name: Patent Thousand Sun
descriptionLines: An ancient book titled The Only Sun on the Sky.
It is not known when anyone wrote down, but it contains knowledge of the heavenly bodies.
Seeing the intense energy of the sun, it began to exert its natural power.
It resonates with Great Hero Boots.
Aumenta melee physical o dano by 4%.
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Prominence Kick^000000 by 20%.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Diminui After Attack Delay by 10%).
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Solar Burst^000000 by 25%.
Aumenta physical o dano against all raced enemies by 15%.

540011.name: Patent Exorcist's Bible
descriptionLines: The Bible on Demon Era, reportedly used em ancient high priests.
Seeing that the divine power was inhabited, he began to exert its natural power.
It resonates with Great Hero Boots.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Duple Light^000000 e ^009900Judex^000000 em 25%.
Reduz o atraso após ataque em 10%.
Aumenta ^777777Sagrado^000000 elemental magic o dano em 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Duple Light^000000 e ^009900Judex^000000 em additional 30%.
Ataques físicos têm chance de auto-cast Level 5 ^009900Adoramus^000000 (If you learned a higher Level, it will auto cast that Level instead.).

540013.name: Fortified Book
descriptionLines: A weapon enhanced by using Etel's magical power.
New abilities that had not been discovered before began to emerge.
Aumenta all elemental magic o dano by 2%.

540014.name: Penitentia Codex
descriptionLines: A book containing the pain of bereavement.
Increases o dano of ^009900Diamond Storm^000000 and ^009900Terra Drive^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Diamond Dust^000000 and ^009900Earth Grave^000000 by 3%.
Decreases Variable Casting Time of all skills by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Diamond Dust^000000 and ^009900Earth Grave^000000 by additional 25%.
Decreases ^009900Diamond Dust^000000 and ^009900Earth Grave^000000 skill cooldown by 2 seconds.
[Grade D]: o dano of ^009900Diamond Storm^000000 and ^009900Terra Drive^000000 +5%.
[Grade C]: o dano of ^009900Diamond Storm^000000 and ^009900Terra Drive^000000 +8%, S.MATK +1.
[Grade B]: o dano of ^009900Diamond Storm^000000 and ^009900Terra Drive^000000 +12%, SPL +1.
